copyTab.templates.name: Change (Singular)
copyTab.templates.suffix:
Implement this change, put informative logs properly everywhere so even if there is a  problem, you have more info to work with.

Write tests to validate and verify this. Don't stop until lint, typecheck, test and build are successful for entire workspace.

copyTab.templates.name: Change (Plural)
copyTab.templates.suffix:
Implement these changes, put informative logs properly everywhere so even if there is a  problem, you have more info to work with.

Write tests to validate and verify for each of these. Don't stop until lint, typecheck, test and build are successful for entire workspace.

copyTab.templates.suffix:

Write tests to validate and verify this. Don't stop until lint, typecheck, test and build are successful for entire workspace.
